data.title: Code Metal closes $125M Series B funding, led by Salesforce Ventures, at $1.25B valuation. Former Tableau CEO joins.
data.description: In Boston, Code Metal, a top provider of reliable code translation for crucial sectors, revealed the completion of its Series B funding round, securing $125 million. The financing was spearheaded by Salesforce Ventures, with contributions from Accel, B Capital, Smith Point Capital, J2 Ventures, Shield Capital, Overmatch, RTX, and various other investors. Additionally, Ryan Aytay, ex-CEO of Tableau, has been appointed as the President and COO of Code Metal. This investment round follows shortly after.

data.title: Kingland achieves CMMI Level 5 for software development maturity for the fourth time in a row on Feb. 19, 2026.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Clear Lake, Iowa, Kingland Systems, a prominent provider of enterprise data, risk, and regulatory software, revealed that it has achieved a successful reappraisal at Maturity Level 5 of the Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI) Institute. This accomplishment showcases Kingland's commitment to excellence and signifies its capability to deliver top-notch services.

data.title: FM buys 10 Memorial Boulevard in Providence to boost connectivity in Rhode Island's innovation economy.
data.description: FM, a commercial property insurer based in Rhode Island, revealed its recent acquisition of 10 Memorial Boulevard in Johnston, RI on February 19, 2026. This investment, situated at the heart of Rhode Island's innovation economy, is expected to enhance FM's connectivity across the region. The move signifies FM's strategic towards reinforcing its presence in the local market.

data.title: APhA Foundation announces 2026 Student Scholarship Program recipients. Honoring student pharmacists.
data.description: The American Pharmacists Association Foundation revealed the 2026 awardees of the Student Scholarship Program on February 19th, 2026. This program acknowledges student pharmacists who contribute their efforts to enhance and promote the pharmacy field.

data.title: Dow Jones drops amid U.S.-Iran tensions after surprise jobless claims, Carvana stock plunges, Etsy soars on deal news.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline as a result of unexpected weekly jobless claims, leading to a significant drop. Carvana stock also plummeted following its earnings report. The market was affected by escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran. On a positive note, Etsy witnessed a surge after news of a new deal. The fluctuating market conditions were further exacerbated by this geopolitical situation.

data.title: ParkOhio (NASDAQ: PKOH) to announce Q4 and full year 2025 results via webcast on March 5, 2026 at 9am Eastern Time.
data.description: ParkOhio (PKOH) has reported that their Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results Conference Call will take place on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The webcast will be live over the Internet and interested individuals can access it by logging on to the provided link. For further information, contact Matthew V. Crawford, Chairman, President, & Chief Executive Officer at 440.947.2000.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig appoints Jonathan Temps as a shareholder in Chicago, expanding Private Funds Group and Real Estate Practice.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Greenberg Traurig, LLP, a global law firm, announced the expansion of its Private Funds Group by welcoming Jonathan Temps as a new shareholder in Chicago. This addition aims to strengthen the firm's Global Real Estate Practice. Temps, previously from another organization, will bring valuable expertise to the team.

data.title: Casey's to report Q3 fiscal 2026 results on March 9th, with earnings call on March 10th at 7:30am central time.
data.description: In Ankeny, Iowa, Casey’s General Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: CASY), a top convenience store chain in the U.S., is set to release its third quarter fiscal 2026 figures post-market closure on March 9th, 2026. For a detailed review, Casey’s will conduct a conference call and webcast on the following day, March 10th, at 7:30am central time. The live event can be accessed through a webcast on Casey's website under the Investor Relations section at https://investor.caseys.com/.
